reasoning: The daily mean temperature in Nancy-Ochey in early November (Nov 9) is on average around 7.5-8.5°C, while in early February (Feb 7) it is on average around 2.5-3.5°C. With a daily standard deviation of about 4-5°C, the difference (Feb 7 minus Nov 9) has a mean of approximately -4.5°C and a standard deviation around 6.5°C. The probability that the temperature on Feb 7 will be higher than on Nov 9 equates to the chance of this difference being >0. Using a normal approximation, this gives a Z-score of ~0.7, corresponding to roughly a 20-25% chance of the February date being warmer. Thus, 0.26 is a reasonable expected probability.
